productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Can Can Women Perfume
description: paris hilton's Can Can perfume is inspired by the film Moulin Rouge and comes in a delectable flask. Fruity, floral yet sensual fragrance.  Top notes are clementine blossom, black currant and nectarine with mid notes of wild orchid and orange blossom, while the base brings soft musk, amber and precious woods.   Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
